title: Board Footers not calculating
excerpt: I recently added Board Footers from Monday.labs, however now the footers no longer auto calculate group values in the board when all groups are collapsed, as they did before.  The only way to see the total of all of the …

posts.author: rich.leewilby (rich.leewilby)
posts.cookedHtml: I recently added Board Footers from Monday.labs, however now the footers no longer auto calculate group values in the board when all groups are collapsed, as they did before. The only way to see the total of all of the groups in a board is to expand each of the groups, then the board footer is able to calculate. This previously worked without having to expand each group. Has something changes recently or is there are way to switch on auto-calculate??

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @rich.leewilby,

Can you try activating this feature in monday.labs instead, and let me know if it changes anything?
